EXPLICIT_VARIABLE_COT.interpretation: prompt-elicitation / multi-entity-tracking repair candidate, not raw capability proof
EXPLICIT_VARIABLE_COT.success: >=5/14 no-correct-arm rows newly correct AND matched-control damage <=1

FINALIZER_REPLAY_ONLY.success: >=4/14 no-correct-arm rows rescored correct from prior/current raw outputs

FIXED1024_CEILING.interpretation: budget ceiling diagnostic only, never global policy
FIXED1024_CEILING.success: >=3/14 no-correct-arm rows newly correct AND no net control damage >2

FIXED768_CONTINUATION.success: >=3/14 no-correct-arm rows newly correct AND no net control damage >1

MINIMAL_PLAIN_COT.success: >=3/14 no-correct-arm rows newly correct OR clear reduction in overthink/damage rows

STRUCTURED_FACT_EQUATION_COT.interpretation: prompt structure / equation extraction repair candidate
STRUCTURED_FACT_EQUATION_COT.success: >=5/14 no-correct-arm rows newly correct AND matched-control damage <=1
